title: Ironclad meld — Grok16 field compiler absorbed into capstone truth
policy: G16 builds under Ironclad — subsidiary field sanity melds without amending sealed doctrine.

single_fabric.declaration: Single fabric — one belt amplitude, one field depth.

verses.text: Time is linear — G16 forge and linker timestamp from sovereign linear_ns only; never rewind, never branch.
G1ID meld inputs carry linear_ns and derived_utc — geometry stays 3D; wall clock is witness only.

books.title: G16 Field Sanity — integral forge simplify

verses.text: Grok16 forge layers meld into Ironclad — one integral pass across driver, compiler, mandate, profiles.
classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — never obtuse; never stack hot rebuild paths under thermo heat.
g16 unified discerns C, C++, Python — field sanity witnesses each layer before link.
G16_FIELD_SAFETY_MANDATE_v1 holds; Ironclad citation required on every field target meld.
G16 field linker owns the link pass — discern OS, witness Ironclad, silicon mandate, then bfd/mach-o/pe dispatch.

books.title: Spatial Existence — This One / That One on G16

verses.text: Grok16 forge absorbs ironclad:spatial_existence — this one is the operator prefix and witnessed silicon here.
That one is any uncorroborated target, phantom link input, or ventriloquist sense lane — blocked until correlate_existence passes.
g16-spatial-existence.py melds NewLatest ironclad-spatial-existence into every ironclad sanity gate and linker witness.
Field sanity simplify and spatial existence run one integral pass — never stack hot paths; never collapse this one into that one.
